chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-284 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of main case. 14.02.2025 Ms. Tasleem Pasha Advocate for Respondent No.3. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General ------- 1. Neither the Applicant nor his Counsel are present since morning at 12:20 p.m. On the last date also no one was present on behalf of the Applicant so was the case on 24.01.2025 and 27.08.2024. 2. With the assistance of learned APG I have perused the record and it appears that the impugned Order has been rightly passed considering some personal disputes between the parties. 3. Learned Counsel for Respondent No.3 also points out that in the police Report also, it has been mentioned that some cheque was obtained from the Respondent Lady by the Applicant and based on which she was blackmailed. Per learned Counsel this is a same cheque based on which Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-282/2024 has been filed by the present applicant Muhammad Zubair. The Report supports the credence to the statement made by the learned Counsel and also in view of the fact that Summary Suit No.22/2024 has also been filed by present Muhammad Zubair against the private Respondent No.3. It appears that the subject cheque is subject matter of the some personal / private disputes between the parties. 4. Furthermore, as per the principles laid down in the case of Munawar Alam Khan [2024 SCMR 985], the entire circumstances and the relationship between the Parties are to be considered while deciding Application under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C.

It appears that the subject cheque is subject matter of the some personal / private disputes between the parties. 4. Furthermore, as per the principles laid down in the case of Munawar Alam Khan [2024 SCMR 985], the entire circumstances and the relationship between the Parties are to be considered while deciding Application under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. The Ex-Officio Justice of Peace has rightly considered all these transactions and has rightly dismissed the Application under Section 22-A & B Cr.P.C and since no cognizable offence is made out the present Application is therefore dismissed JUDGE Ali Haider
